channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VINYLINDIA] Vinyl Chemicals: Madhukar Parekh Re-appointed as MD
item.description:
Vinyl Chemicals (India) Ltd. announces the re-appointment of Shri Madhukar Parekh as Managing Director for a further period of 5 years effective April 1, 2027, and the re-appointment of Shri Prakash Shah as an Independent Director for a second consecutive term of 5 years effective October 6, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The appointments were approved at the Board of Directors meeting held on April 24, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

  • Madhukar Parekh re-appointed as Managing Director for 5 years from April 1, 2027.
  • Prakash Shah re-appointed as Independent Director for 5 years from October 6, 2026.
  • Appointments are subject to shareholders' approval.
  • Madhukar Parekh has over 55 years of experience in sales, marketing, and management.
  • Prakash Shah has over 4 decades of experience in commercial, real estate, and tax litigation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINYL CHEMICALS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RNITAI] Rnit Ai Solutions Board Meeting on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office in Hyderabad. The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Meeting to be held at Plot No. 92, 93 & 94, First Floor, Kavuri Hills, Madhapur, Hyderabad.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Consideration of audited financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PASUFIN] Pasupati Fincap EGM Approves Resolutions
item.description:
Pasupati Fincap Ltd. held an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on April 24, 2026, where shareholders approved resolutions including change of company name, reduction of share capital, borrowing powers, authorization of loans, and appointment of a new director. The meeting was conducted with e-voting and poll options, overseen by a scrutinizer, and complied with SEBI regulations.

  • Pasupati Fincap EGM held on April 24, 2026, approved all resolutions.
  • Resolutions included change of name and share capital reduction.
  • Approval for borrowing powers and loan authorizations granted.
  • Rakhi Sharma appointed as a non-executive independent director.
  • E-voting facility provided to shareholders as per regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PASUPATI FINCAP LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [SIRCA] Sirca Paints Board Meeting on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Sirca Paints India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of a final dividend, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will re-open 48 hours after the conclusion of the board meeting. The information will be available on the company website.

  • Sirca Paints board to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board to consider final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window to re-open 48 hours post board meeting.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sirca Paints India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ONGC] ONGC Appoints Yogish Nayak S. as CFO, Forms Petrochemicals JVC
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) approved the appointment of Shri Yogish Nayak S. as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) effective May 1, 2026. Additionally, the board approved the formation of a Joint Venture Company (JVC) with OPaL and MRPL, with ONGC holding 50% share and contributing ₹25 crore towards equity. The JVC aims to integrate petrochemicals marketing and improve revenue. The board also approved an equity investment of up to ₹79.48 Crore and a corporate guarantee of up to ₹185.45 Crore to IGGL for the Duliajan Feeder Line Project.

  • Yogish Nayak S. appointed as CFO of ONGC effective May 1, 2026.
  • ONGC to form Petrochemicals JVC with OPaL and MRPL, investing ₹25 crore.
  • ₹79.48 Crore equity investment approved for IGGL's Duliajan Feeder Line Project.
  • Corporate Guarantee support of upto ₹185.45 Crore approved for IGGL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ONGC] ONGC Appoints Yogish Nayak S. as CFO, eff. May 1, 2026
item.description:
Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) announced the appointment of Shri Yogish Nayak S. as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) effective May 1, 2026. The decision was approved during a Board of Directors meeting held on April 25, 2026. Additionally, the board approved the formation of a Joint Venture Company (JVC) with OPaL and MRPL, with ONGC contributing ₹25 crore towards equity. They also approved an equity investment of up to ₹79.48 Crore and a corporate guarantee of up to ₹185.45 Crore to IGGL for the Duliajan Feeder Line Project.

  • Shri Yogish Nayak S. appointed as CFO of ONGC effective May 1, 2026.
  • ONGC to form JVC with OPaL and MRPL, investing ₹25 crore.
  • Board approves ₹79.48 Crore equity investment in IGGL's Duliajan Feeder Line Project.
  • Corporate guarantee support of up to ₹185.45 Crore approved for IGGL project.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MIRZAINT] Mirza International: NCLT Approves Amalgamation with RTS Fashion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, Prayagraj, approved the Scheme of Amalgamation of RTS Fashion Limited with Mirza International Limited on April 23, 2026. The appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025. The amalgamation was uploaded to the NCLT website on April 25, 2026.

  • NCLT Allahabad approved the amalgamation of RTS Fashion Limited with Mirza International Limited.
  • The order was pronounced on April 23, 2026, and uploaded on April 25, 2026.
  • The appointed date of the Scheme of Amalgamation is April 1, 2025.
  • The transferor company is RTS Fashion Limited, and the transferee company is Mirza International Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MIRZA INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [MEESHO] Meesho Board Meeting Scheduled for May 6, 2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Meesho Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Meesho's board will meet on May 6, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meesho Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KIRANVYPAR] Kiran Vyapar: Placid Ltd Merger Effective; Gets Maharaja Shree Umaid Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kiran Vyapar Ltd reports that its associate company, Placid Limited, has been merged with Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited following NCLT approval. The scheme became effective on April 25, 2026, after filing with the Registrar of Companies. As a result, Placid Limited is dissolved and ceases to be an associate of Kiran Vyapar. Kiran Vyapar will receive equity shares of Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills at a rate of 515 shares for every 1 share held in Placid Limited.

  • Placid Limited merged with Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills, effective April 25, 2026.
  • Kiran Vyapar will receive Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills shares in exchange for its Placid Limited holdings.
  • Placid Limited ceases to be an associate of Kiran Vyapar.
  • As of March 31, 2025, Placid Limited contributed ₹53.88 crores (26.26%) to turnover and ₹459.77 crores (20.97%) to net worth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kiran Vyapar Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [NLCINDIA] NLC India Granted Composite Licence for Chhattisgarh Blocks
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NLC India Ltd (NLCIL) has been granted composite licences by the Mineral Resources Department, Govt. of Chhattisgarh, for the Semhardih Phosphorite & Limestone Block and Raipura Phosphorite & Limestone Block. This follows NLCIL emerging as the preferred bidder in the Tranche–V auction conducted by the Ministry of Mines and the subsequent submission of Performance Securities to the Government of Chhattisgarh. The licences, issued on April 24, 2026, permit NLCIL to conduct detailed geological exploration in the specified blocks.

  • NLCIL secured composite licences for Semhardih & Raipura blocks in Chhattisgarh.
  • Licences granted by Mineral Resources Department on April 24, 2026.
  • NLCIL to conduct detailed geological exploration in the blocks.
  • NLCIL submitted Scheme of Prospecting on March 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NLC India Ltd | Category: Business Update
